revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 14 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 14 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月14日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平宝字]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[764年]][[11月11日]]） - [[淳仁天皇]]（淡路廃帝）が[[淡路島]]に流される * [[享保]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1720年]][[11月13日]]） - 紙屋治兵衛と紀伊国屋小春とが心中。[[近松門左衛門]]が『[[心中天網島]]』として脚色し同年初演 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大政奉還]]。[[徳川慶喜]]が朝廷に政権返上の上奏文を差出す
== 誕生日 == * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[11月30日]]） - [[陸羯南]]、政治[[評論家]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1328年]][[11月16日]]） - [[久明親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代将軍（* [[1276年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[11月12日]]） - [[徳川家宣]]、[[江戸幕府]]6代将軍（* [[1663年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[12月2日]]） - [[伴信友]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1773年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月13日 (旧暦)|10月13日]] 翌日[[10月15日 (旧暦)|10月15日]] - 前月[[9月14日 (旧暦)|9月14日]] 翌月[[11月14日 (旧暦)|11月14日]] *新暦[[10月14日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月14日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平宝字]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[764年]][[11月11日]]） - [[淳仁天皇]]（淡路廃帝）が[[淡路島]]に流される * [[享保]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1720年]][[11月13日]]） - 紙屋治兵衛と紀伊国屋小春とが心中。[[近松門左衛門]]が『[[心中天網島]]』として脚色し同年初演 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大政奉還]]。[[徳川慶喜]]が朝廷に政権返上の上奏文を差出す
== 誕生日 == * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[11月30日]]） - [[陸羯南]]、政治[[評論家]]（+ [[1907年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1328年]][[11月16日]]） - [[久明親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代将軍（* [[1276年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[11月12日]]） - [[徳川家宣]]、[[江戸幕府]]6代将軍（* [[1663年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[12月2日]]） - [[伴信友]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1773年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[12月3日]]） - [[小松清廉]]、[[薩摩藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1870年]]） * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[11月30日]]） - [[陸羯南]]、政治[[評論家]]、新聞記者（+ [[1907年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[12月1日]]） - [[岩崎久弥]]、実業家、第3代[[三菱財閥]]主宰（+ [[1955年]]） * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年12月1日） - [[竹越與三郎]]、[[衆議院]]議員、[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]議員、歴史家、評論家（+ [[1950年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1328年]][[11月16日]]） - [[久明親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1276年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[11月12日]]） - [[徳川家宣]]、[[江戸幕府]]6代将軍（* [[1663年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[12月2日]]） - [[伴信友]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1773年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月26日]]） - [[黒駒勝蔵]]、[[侠客]]（* [[1832年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|13|10|15|9|14|11|10|1014}}

== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[12月3日]]） - [[小松清廉]]、[[薩摩藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1870年]]） * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[11月30日]]） - [[陸羯南]]、政治[[評論家]]、新聞記者（+ [[1907年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[12月1日]]） - [[岩崎久弥]]、実業家、第3代[[三菱財閥]]主宰（+ [[1955年]]） * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年12月1日） - [[竹越與三郎]]、[[衆議院]]議員、[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]議員、歴史家、評論家（+ [[1950年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1328年]][[11月16日]]） - [[久明親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1276年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[11月12日]]） - [[徳川家宣]]、[[江戸幕府]]6代将軍（* [[1663年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[12月2日]]） - [[伴信友]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1773年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月26日]]） - [[黒駒勝蔵]]、[[侠客]]（* [[1832年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[12月3日]]） - [[小松清廉]]、[[薩摩藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1870年]]） * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[11月30日]]） - [[陸羯南]]、政治[[評論家]]、新聞記者（+ [[1907年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[12月1日]]） - [[岩崎久弥]]、実業家、第3代[[三菱財閥]]主宰（+ [[1955年]]） * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年12月1日） - [[竹越與三郎]]、[[衆議院]]議員、[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]議員、歴史家、評論家（+ [[1950年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1328年]][[11月16日]]） - [[久明親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1276年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[11月12日]]） - [[徳川家宣]]、[[江戸幕府]]6代将軍（* [[1663年]]） * [[享保]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1732年]][[12月1日]]） - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（* [[1719年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[12月2日]]） - [[伴信友]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1773年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月26日]]） - [[黒駒勝蔵]]、[[侠客]]（* [[1832年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|13|10|15|9|14|11|10|1014}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

== Births == * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[12月3日]]） - [[小松清廉]]、[[薩摩藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1870年]]） * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[11月30日]]） - [[陸羯南]]、政治[[評論家]]、新聞記者（+ [[1907年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[12月1日]]） - [[岩崎久弥]]、実業家、第3代[[三菱財閥]]主宰（+ [[1955年]]） * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年12月1日） - [[竹越與三郎]]、[[衆議院]]議員、[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]議員、歴史家、評論家（+ [[1950年]]）
== Deaths == * [[嘉暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1328年]][[11月16日]]） - [[久明親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1276年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[11月12日]]） - [[徳川家宣]]、[[江戸幕府]]6代将軍（* [[1663年]]） * [[享保]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1732年]][[12月1日]]） - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（* [[1719年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[12月2日]]） - [[伴信友]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1773年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月26日]]） - [[黒駒勝蔵]]、[[侠客]]（* [[1832年]]）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:October 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] [[zh:十月十四]] [[en:draft:October 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|天平宝字}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}}, a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}}, a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}}, an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1865年12月1日） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}}, a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] [[zh:十月十四]] [[en:draft:October 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|天平宝字}}8年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}}, a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}}, a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}}, an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1865年12月1日） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}}, a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|天平神護}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}}, the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}}9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}}） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}}, the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}}, an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}}, a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}}） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}}, a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}}, an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}}, a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}}).

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō宝字}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==

== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō宝字}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō宝字}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==

[[sn:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] [[zh:十月十四]] [[en:draft:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō宝字}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ). == See Also! ==

== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō宝字}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō宝字}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

[[sn:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] [[zh:十月十四]] [[en:draft:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[sn:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] [[zh:十月十四]] [[en:draft:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|764|ja|764}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|765|ja|765}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō-hōji|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|764|ja|764|12=draft}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉|12=draft}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南|12=draft}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥|12=draft}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎|12=draft}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]]
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]]

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉|12=draft}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南|12=draft}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥|12=draft}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎|12=draft}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft}} ).

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō-hōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|764|ja|764|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft|12=draft}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft|12=draft}} submitted a memorandum to the court.

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō-hōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|764|ja|764|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft|12=draft}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft|12=draft}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南|12=draft|12=draft}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥|12=draft|12=draft}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]]
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十一]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 14 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 14일]] [[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月十四]] [[en:draft:October 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:October 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 11일]] [[ja:10月11日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月十一]] [[en:draft:October 11 (Lunisolar)]]

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō-hōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|764|ja|764|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft|12=draft}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft|12=draft}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南|12=draft|12=draft}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥|12=draft|12=draft}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|Tenpyō-hōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|764|ja|764|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 11|ja|11月11日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1720|ja|1720|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|ja|近松門左衛門|12=draft|12=draft}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|ja|徳川慶喜|12=draft|12=draft}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1835|ja|1835|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Seiren|ja|小松清廉|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1857|ja|1857|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 30|ja|11月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Rikugyaku Nan|ja|陸羯南|12=draft|12=draft}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ikamasa Hisaya|ja|岩崎久弥|12=draft|12=draft}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Takegoshi Yosaburō|ja|竹越與三郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|765|ja|765|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Junnin|ja|淳仁天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1669|ja|1669|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 16|ja|11月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=draft|12=draft}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月14日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつじゅうよっか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平宝字]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[764年]][[11月11日]]） - [[淳仁天皇]]（淡路廃帝）が[[淡路島]]に流される * [[享保]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1720年]][[11月13日]]） - 紙屋治兵衛と紀伊国屋小春とが心中。[[近松門左衛門]]が『[[心中天網島]]』として脚色し同年初演 * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大政奉還]]。[[徳川慶喜]]が朝廷に政権返上の上奏文を差出す
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[12月3日]]） - [[小松清廉]]、[[薩摩藩]]士・[[政治家]]（+ [[1870年]]） * [[安政]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1857年]][[11月30日]]） - [[陸羯南]]、政治[[評論家]]、新聞記者（+ [[1907年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[12月1日]]） - [[岩崎久弥]]、実業家、第3代[[三菱財閥]]主宰（+ [[1955年]]） * 慶応元年（グレゴリオ暦1865年12月1日） - [[竹越與三郎]]、[[衆議院]]議員、[[貴族院 (日本)|貴族院]]議員、歴史家、評論家（+ [[1950年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉暦]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1328年]][[11月16日]]） - [[久明親王]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]8代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1276年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1712年]][[11月12日]]） - [[徳川家宣]]、[[江戸幕府]]6代将軍（* [[1663年]]） * [[享保]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1732年]][[12月1日]]） - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（* [[1719年]]） * [[弘化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1846年]][[12月2日]]） - [[伴信友]]、[[国学者]]（* [[1773年]]） * [[明治]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月26日]]） - [[黒駒勝蔵]]、[[侠客]]（* [[1832年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|13|10|15|9|14|11|10|1014}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji|2=ja|3=天平宝字|ja|Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji|2=ja|3=天平宝字|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō-hōji|qq=}} 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|764|ja|764|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/764|qq=}} [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1720|qq=}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1867|ja|1867|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1867|qq=}} [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=}} ).

(era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1127|ja|1127|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1127|qq=}} [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1045|qq=}} ). *
