[[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1377|qq=}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1856|ja|1856|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1856|qq=}} [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1787|qq=}} ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|764|ja|764|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/764|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700}} [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1720|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1867|ja|1867|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1867|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1127|ja|1127|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1127|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1045|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1433|ja|1433|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1433|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1377|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1856|ja|1856|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1856|qq=}} [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1787|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|764|ja|764|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/764|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700}} [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1720|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1867|ja|1867|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1867|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|1433|ja|1433|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1433|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1377|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1856|ja|1856|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1856|qq=}} [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1787|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1669|ja|1669|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1669|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1856|ja|1856|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1856|qq=}} [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1787|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|764|ja|764|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/764|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700}} [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1720|ja|1720|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1720|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1867|ja|1867|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1867|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ).

* [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1856|ja|1856|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1856|qq=}} [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1787|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).

* [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1856|ja|1856|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1856|qq=}} [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1787|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|764|ja|764|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/764|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700}} [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1867|ja|1867|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1867|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1835|ja|1835|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1835|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1856|ja|1856|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1856|qq=}} [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|764|ja|764|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/764|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700}} [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1867|ja|1867|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1867|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1857|ja|1857|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1857|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] {{ill|1865|ja|1865|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1865|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|764|ja|764|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/764|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 700}} [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|ja|1870|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1870|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|ja|1907|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1907|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|ja|1955|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1955|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|ja|1950|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1950|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1000}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|765|ja|765|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/765|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|976|ja|976|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/976|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 900}} [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|ja|927|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/927|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=Taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

revision.comment: Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
