<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh min nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十四]] {{wikidata link|Q840361}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|10|10|12|9|11|11|10|1011|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:November 11|November 11]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1720|1720]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by [[:en:Chikamatsu Monzaemon|Chikamatsu Monzaemon]] in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ） – [[:en:Komatsu Kiyokado|Komatsu Seiren]] , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1870|1870]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1857|1857]] [[:en:November 30|November 30]] ） – [[:en:Kuga Katsunan|Rikugyaku Nan]] , a political critic and journalist († [[:en:1907|1907]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Hisaya Iwasaki|Ikamasa Hisaya]] , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († [[:en:1955|1955]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – [[:en:Takekoshi Yosaburō|Takegoshi Yosaburō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († [[:en:1950|1950]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:765|765]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Junnin|Junnin]] , the 47th emperor. * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1669|1669]] [[:en:November 16|November 16]] ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] , an agrarian reformer (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Go-Komatsu|WD=Q123052|lt=Go-Komatsu}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|en|1377|WD=Q6289|lt=1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|en|Ninomiya Sontoku|WD=Q968964|lt=Ninomiya Sontoku}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787}} ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月十四]][[zh:十月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840361]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Junnin}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|WD=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Kiyokado|en|Komatsu Kiyokado|WD=Q703847|lt=Komatsu Seiren}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Kuga Katsunan|en|Kuga Katsunan|WD=Q3200221|lt=Rikugyaku Nan}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|en|1907|WD=Q2048|lt=1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Hisaya Iwasaki|en|Hisaya Iwasaki|WD=Q11474430|lt=Ikamasa Hisaya}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|en|1955|WD=Q18577|lt=1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Takekoshi Yosaburō|en|Takekoshi Yosaburō|WD=Q7678002|lt=Takegoshi Yosaburō}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|en|1950|WD=Q18597|lt=1950}} ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Junnin}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|WD=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Kiyokado|en|Komatsu Kiyokado|WD=Q703847|lt=Komatsu Seiren}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Kuga Katsunan|en|Kuga Katsunan|WD=Q3200221|lt=Rikugyaku Nan}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|en|1907|WD=Q2048|lt=1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Hisaya Iwasaki|en|Hisaya Iwasaki|WD=Q11474430|lt=Ikamasa Hisaya}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|en|1955|WD=Q18577|lt=1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Takekoshi Yosaburō|en|Takekoshi Yosaburō|WD=Q7678002|lt=Takegoshi Yosaburō}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|en|1950|WD=Q18597|lt=1950}} ).

Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|976|en|976|WD=Q23782|lt=976}} {{ill|November 14|en|November 14|WD=Q2983|lt=November 14}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Taizu of Song|en|Emperor Taizu of Song|WD=Q7471|lt=Zhao Kuangyin}} (Taizu), the first emperor of the Northern Song (* {{ill|927|en|927|WD=Q30470|lt=927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|WD=Q3083118|lt=Minamoto no Yoshimitsu}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} (* {{ill|1045|en|1045|WD=Q19351|lt=1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Komatsu|en|Emperor Go-Komatsu|WD=Q123052|lt=Go-Komatsu}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|en|1377|WD=Q6289|lt=1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|en|Ninomiya Sontoku|WD=Q968964|lt=Ninomiya Sontoku}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787}} ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764|1=764}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11|1=November 11}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Junnin|1=Emperor Junnin}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13|1=November 13}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|WD=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3|1=December 3}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Kiyokado|en|Komatsu Kiyokado|WD=Q703847|lt=Komatsu Seiren|1=Komatsu Kiyokado}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30|1=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Kuga Katsunan|en|Kuga Katsunan|WD=Q3200221|lt=Rikugyaku Nan|1=Kuga Katsunan}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|en|1907|WD=Q2048|lt=1907|1=1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Hisaya Iwasaki|en|Hisaya Iwasaki|WD=Q11474430|lt=Ikamasa Hisaya|1=Hisaya Iwasaki}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|en|1955|WD=Q18577|lt=1955|1=1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Takekoshi Yosaburō|en|Takekoshi Yosaburō|WD=Q7678002|lt=Takegoshi Yosaburō|1=Takekoshi Yosaburō}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|en|1950|WD=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshōjingo|ja|Tenpyō神護|1=Tenpyō-jingo|2=ja|3=天平神護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshōjingo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373181}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|765|en|765|WD=Q31216|lt=765|1=765}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10|1=November 10}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Junnin|1=Emperor Junnin}} , the 47th emperor. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1669|en|1669|WD=Q7602|lt=1669|1=1669}} {{ill|November 16|en|November 16|WD=Q3029|lt=November 16|1=November 16}} ） – {{ill|Shakusha In|ja|シャクシャイン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakusha In|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakushain|WD=Q3280296}} , the Ainu chief. * {{ill|Taihei Kōkoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihei Kōkoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Q10936305|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127|1=1127}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25|1=November 25}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|WD=Q3083118|lt=Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|1=Minamoto no Yoshimitsu}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} (* {{ill|1045|en|1045|WD=Q19351|lt=1045|1=1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō|1=Eikyō}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433|1=1433}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Komatsu|en|Emperor Go-Komatsu|WD=Q123052|lt=Go-Komatsu|1=Emperor Go-Komatsu}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court (* {{ill|1377|en|1377|WD=Q6289|lt=1377|1=1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17|1=November 17}} ） – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|en|Ninomiya Sontoku|WD=Q968964|lt=Ninomiya Sontoku|1=Ninomiya Sontoku}} , an agrarian reformer (* {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787|1=1787}} ).

{{Not to be confused with|October 14|qq=October 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} , the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764|1=764}} {{ill|November 11|en|November 11|WD=Q2987|lt=November 11|1=November 11}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Junnin|en|Emperor Junnin|WD=Q329713|lt=Junnin|1=Emperor Junnin}} (the deposed emperor) was exiled to Awaji. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13|1=November 13}} ） – Paper merchant Jiyobei and Kii merchant Koharu committed double suicide; later dramatized by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|WD=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} in "Shin-chū Tenmōjima". * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}} ） – The Taisei Hōkan (return of political power) took place as {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} submitted a memorandum to the court.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3|1=December 3}} ） – {{ill|Komatsu Kiyokado|en|Komatsu Kiyokado|WD=Q703847|lt=Komatsu Seiren|1=Komatsu Kiyokado}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|November 30|en|November 30|WD=Q3015|lt=November 30|1=November 30}} ） – {{ill|Kuga Katsunan|en|Kuga Katsunan|WD=Q3200221|lt=Rikugyaku Nan|1=Kuga Katsunan}} , a political critic and journalist († {{ill|1907|en|1907|WD=Q2048|lt=1907|1=1907}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Hisaya Iwasaki|en|Hisaya Iwasaki|WD=Q11474430|lt=Ikamasa Hisaya|1=Hisaya Iwasaki}} , an entrepreneur and 3rd head of the Mitsubishi zaibatsu († {{ill|1955|en|1955|WD=Q18577|lt=1955|1=1955}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}} ） – {{ill|Takekoshi Yosaburō|en|Takekoshi Yosaburō|WD=Q7678002|lt=Takegoshi Yosaburō|1=Takekoshi Yosaburō}} , a member of the House of Representatives and member of the House of Peers, historian and critic († {{ill|1950|en|1950|WD=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}} ).
